targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS time, count(*) as value FROM metrics WHERE type = 'deployment-result' AND JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.is_failure') = false GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT avg(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.lead_time_seconds') AS UNSIGNED) / 60) FROM metrics WHERE type = 'leadtime'
SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.is_failure') = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100 FROM metrics WHERE type = 'deployment-result'
